main.description: Update how the calling app's own notifications are routed for a user. Dual-authenticated: the app authenticates with its service-auth JWT in the Authorization header (like send), and the user's consent is proven by a fresh user-issued service-auth JWT in `userToken`. Both tokens must be audienced to the relay and scoped to this method (lxm). Only the calling app's routing is affected — never the account default, other apps, or channels. Requires an active grant from the user to the app.

userToken.description: A user-issued atproto service-auth JWT (com.atproto.server.getServiceAuth) with aud = the relay's DID and lxm = pub.atmo.notify.setRouting. Identifies the user and proves they authorized this change.

route.description: App-wide route: a '+'-joined channel set of push|telegram|email (e.g. 'push+email'), 'off' for none, or 'default' to inherit the account default. Omit to leave unchanged.

categories.description: Per-category routing overrides for this app. Omit to leave categories unchanged.

id.description: The category key, matching the `category` used in send.

route.description: Route for this category: a '+'-joined channel set of push|telegram|email, 'off' for none, or 'app' to inherit the app-wide route.
